caption: A screen recording displays a web browser open to the "RANDOM.ORG" website, showing a list of NBA teams. A live stream overlay in the bottom right corner shows a man with a beard and dark hair wearing a black t-shirt, sitting in front of a computer setup. A red and white banner at the bottom of the screen reads "JASYP CASEBREAKS.COM". To the right of the main window, a chat sidebar shows messages from users like "glowbug27" and "Nightbot", with a recurring message: "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://bit.ly/2ZqSeka9". The content of the browser window changes from a numbered list starting with "11. NEW ORLEANS PELICANS" to a new randomized list starting with "1. MINNESOTA TIMBERWOLVES". Eventually, the browser displays a longer list including "1. DENVER NUGGETS" and "2. MILLENNIA MAGIC", along with an IP address and a timestamp of "2023-05-20 03:13:27 UTC".
